name: [TEST] Hypixel Network
description: The largest Minecraft server in the world. Home to Bedwars, Skyblock, SkyWars, Murder Mystery, Build Battle, Duels, and dozens more game modes. Over 100,000 players online at peak hours.
description_html: The largest Minecraft server in the world. Home to Bedwars, Skyblock, SkyWars, Murder Mystery, Build Battle, Duels, and dozens more game modes. Over 100,000 players online at peak hours.

name: [TEST] PikaNetwork
description: A massive server network featuring Factions, Lifesteal, Bedwars, KitPvP, Skyblock, and Practice PvP. Active community with frequent updates and events.
description_html: A massive server network featuring Factions, Lifesteal, Bedwars, KitPvP, Skyblock, and Practice PvP. Active community with frequent updates and events.

name: [TEST] Mineplex
description: One of the original Minecraft server networks. Featuring Cake Wars, Survival Games, Super Smash Mobs, Block Hunt, and more classic minigames.
description_html: One of the original Minecraft server networks. Featuring Cake Wars, Survival Games, Super Smash Mobs, Block Hunt, and more classic minigames.

name: [TEST] The Hive
description: One of the biggest Bedrock Edition servers. Play Treasure Wars, SkyWars, Murder Mystery, Block Drop, and more with cross-platform friends.

name: [TEST] OPBlocks
description: A popular Prison and Skyblock server with custom content, an advanced economy, weekly payouts and competitive leaderboards.
